title: Glowing Croatian Applesauce Stew
description: A vegetarian friendly Croatian dish featuring applesauce, with a citrusy and smoky flavor, perfect for midnight cravings. This stew has a unique glassy-jelly texture.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large hot pot vessel over medium heat.
Add the chopped onion and cook until it is translucent.
Add the minced garlic and cook for an additional minute.
Add the smoked paprika, salt, and black pepper, and stir to combine.
Add the chopped carrots and potatoes, and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the vegetable broth, applesauce, and lemon juice, and stir to combine.
Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce the heat to low and simmer for 20 minutes.
Use an immersion blender to puree the stew to a glassy-jelly texture, or allow it to cool and puree it in a blender.
Serve the stew hot, garnished with chopped fresh herbs if desired.
